comparableTransactions.description: Boutique hotel management company, $5-8M revenue, UAE, 3 properties, asset-light model
Tourism services operator, $2-4M revenue, Saudi Arabia, Vision 2030 aligned, seasonal

valuationContext.regionalNotes: GCC data covering UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Oman. Transaction data is scarcer than in Western markets; multiples incorporate proxy calculations from regional listed company benchmarks with SME discounts applied.
disclaimers: Multiples reflect 2022-2025 market conditions and may not represent current pricing
This is an approximation for planning purposes only and should not be relied upon for transaction decisions without professional advice
Size band placement and quality adjustments are indicative; actual deal terms depend on specific business characteristics and negotiation dynamics

GCC transaction data is less liquid than US/European markets; proxy calculations from listed company benchmarks with SME discounts (typically 30-50%) have been applied where direct private transaction data is unavailable
valuationContext.method: Comparable company analysis using EV/EBITDA multiples; where direct SME transaction data is limited, listed company benchmarks (KPMG Q4 2024) with SME discount applied
sources: KPMG GCC Listed Company Valuation Benchmarks (Q4 2024)
Saudi Arabian Monetary Authority (SAMA) FinTech Market Data
UAE Ministry of Economy SME Transaction Reports

valuationContext.regionalNotes: GCC retail benefits from world-class mall infrastructure and high tourist footfall. Saudi Vision 2030 is driving consumer spending diversification. E-commerce penetration is rising rapidly across UAE and Saudi Arabia. Tourist-facing premium brands in Dubai command a meaningful premium. Free zone e-commerce licences in UAE simplify cross-border operations.
disclaimers: Multiples reflect 2022-2025 market conditions and may not represent current pricing
This is an approximation for planning purposes only and should not be relied upon for transaction decisions without professional advice
Size band placement and quality adjustments are indicative; actual deal terms depend on specific business characteristics and negotiation dynamics

valuationContext.regionalNotes: GCC manufacturing benefits from UAE free zone advantages (100% foreign ownership, zero corporate tax for qualifying entities). Saudi NIDLP under Vision 2030 is actively incentivising local manufacturing. Transaction data is limited; multiples are proxied from GCC-listed industrial companies with SME discounts applied (typically 30-50%). Businesses aligned with localisation targets may attract strategic premiums from government-linked buyers.
disclaimers: Multiples reflect 2022-2025 market conditions and may not represent current pricing
This is an approximation for planning purposes only and should not be relied upon for transaction decisions without professional advice
Size band placement and quality adjustments are indicative; actual deal terms depend on specific business characteristics and negotiation dynamics

GCC transaction data is less liquid than US/European markets; proxy calculations from listed company benchmarks with SME discounts (typically 30-50%) have been applied where direct private transaction data is unavailable
valuationContext.method: Comparable company analysis using EV/EBITDA multiples; where direct SME transaction data is limited, listed industrial company benchmarks (KPMG Q4 2024, NIDLP data) with SME discount applied
sources: KPMG GCC Listed Company Valuation Benchmarks (Q4 2024)
Saudi National Industrial Development & Logistics Program (NIDLP) Reports
UAE Ministry of Economy Manufacturing Sector Data
